tables.name: chain_analysis
tables.schema: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS chain_analysis (chain TEXT PRIMARY KEY, take TEXT, sentiment TEXT, trend TEXT, sources TEXT, updated_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')))

tables.name: dead_chains
tables.schema: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dead_chains (chain TEXT PRIMARY KEY, launched TEXT, peak_tvl REAL, current_tvl REAL, drawdown_pct REAL, peak_date TEXT, why TEXT, outlook TEXT, verdict TEXT, sources TEXT, profile TEXT, updated_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')))

tables.name: graveyard_meta
tables.schema: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS graveyard_meta (k TEXT PRIMARY KEY, v TEXT, updated_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')))

tables.name: mid_chains
tables.schema: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS mid_chains (chain TEXT PRIMARY KEY, launched TEXT, tvl REAL, verdict TEXT, why_stuck TEXT, outlook TEXT, profile TEXT, sources TEXT, updated_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')))

tables.name: nft_collections
tables.schema: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS nft_collections (slug TEXT PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, chain TEXT, category TEXT, status TEXT, profile TEXT, sources TEXT, updated_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')))

tables.name: infra_chains
tables.schema: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS infra_chains (slug TEXT PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, category TEXT, status TEXT, profile TEXT, sources TEXT, updated_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')))

tables.name: market_entities
tables.schema: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS market_entities (slug TEXT PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, ticker TEXT, type TEXT, status TEXT, profile TEXT, sources TEXT, updated_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')))

tables.name: stablecoin_meta
tables.schema: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS stablecoin_meta (slug TEXT PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, symbol TEXT, profile TEXT, sources TEXT, updated_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')))

tables.name: risk_flags
tables.schema: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS risk_flags (slug TEXT PRIMARY KEY, entity_type TEXT, entity_name TEXT, level TEXT, summary TEXT, evidence TEXT, sources TEXT, updated_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')))

tables.name: geo_regions
tables.schema: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS geo_regions (slug TEXT PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, region TEXT, kind TEXT, profile TEXT, sources TEXT, updated_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')))

tables.name: rwa_depin
tables.schema: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS rwa_depin (slug TEXT PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, category TEXT, status TEXT, profile TEXT, sources TEXT, updated_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')))

tables.name: us_states
tables.schema: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS us_states (abbr TEXT PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, stance TEXT, profile TEXT, sources TEXT, updated_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')))

tables.name: scam_traces
tables.schema: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS scam_traces (slug TEXT PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, category TEXT, amount_usd REAL, net_usd REAL, recovered_usd REAL, victims INTEGER, start_date TEXT, collapse_date TEXT, status TEXT, chains TEXT, confidence TEXT, profile TEXT, sources TEXT, source_checked_at TEXT, updated_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')))

tables.name: nft_market
tables.schema: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS nft_market (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, chain TEXT, floor_usd REAL, mcap_usd REAL, vol24h_usd REAL, holders INTEGER, supply INTEGER, change24h REAL, url TEXT, updated_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')))

tables.name: scam_addresses
tables.schema: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS scam_addresses (address TEXT, chain TEXT, case_slug TEXT, role TEXT, label TEXT, entity TEXT, entity_id TEXT, cluster_id TEXT, balance_note TEXT, first_seen TEXT, last_seen TEXT, sources TEXT, confidence TEXT DEFAULT 'reported', updated_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')), PRIMARY KEY (address, case_slug))

tables.name: wallet_links
tables.schema: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS wallet_links (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, address_a TEXT, chain_a TEXT, address_b TEXT, chain_b TEXT, link_type TEXT, direction TEXT, confidence TEXT DEFAULT 'reported', evidence TEXT, tx_hash TEXT, tx_url TEXT, case_slug TEXT, entity TEXT, sources TEXT, updated_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')))

tables.name: scam_flows
tables.schema: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS scam_flows (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, case_slug TEXT, from_addr TEXT, to_addr TEXT, from_label TEXT, to_label TEXT, asset TEXT, amount REAL, amount_usd REAL, tx_hash TEXT, tx_url TEXT, ts TEXT, hop_index INTEGER, note TEXT, sources TEXT, updated_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')))

tables.name: scam_actors
tables.schema: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS scam_actors (slug TEXT PRIMARY KEY, case_slug TEXT, real_name TEXT, aliases TEXT, role TEXT, nationality TEXT, status TEXT, links TEXT, summary TEXT, sources TEXT, updated_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')))

tables.name: actor_trail
tables.schema: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS actor_trail (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, actor_slug TEXT, case_slug TEXT, type TEXT, title TEXT, url TEXT, archived_url TEXT, source TEXT, author TEXT, dated TEXT, excerpt TEXT, note TEXT, verified INTEGER DEFAULT 0, updated_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')))

tables.name: scam_links
tables.schema: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS scam_links (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, a_slug TEXT, b_slug TEXT, kind TEXT, detail TEXT, evidence TEXT, sources TEXT, updated_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')))

tables.name: scam_intel
tables.schema: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS scam_intel (slug TEXT PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, category TEXT, chain TEXT, approx_loss_usd REAL, discovered_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')), incident_date TEXT, severity TEXT, credibility TEXT, status TEXT DEFAULT 'candidate', culpable TEXT, connections TEXT, summary TEXT, how_it_happened TEXT, what_stolen TEXT, aftermath TEXT, links TEXT, sources TEXT, debate_notes TEXT, updated_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')))

tables.name: risk_signals
tables.schema: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS risk_signals (slug TEXT PRIMARY KEY, target TEXT, target_name TEXT, chain TEXT, signal_type TEXT, severity TEXT, description TEXT, evidence TEXT, matched_addresses TEXT, matched_cases TEXT, status TEXT DEFAULT 'watch', confidence TEXT DEFAULT 'low', sources TEXT, updated_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')))

tables.name: desk_log
tables.schema: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS desk_log (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, desk TEXT, run_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')), target TEXT, action TEXT, outcome TEXT, items_touched INTEGER DEFAULT 0, notes TEXT)
